scripts.test: npm run catalog:check && npm run typecheck
scripts.test:render-fixture: mkdir -p out/fixtures && remotion render DirectorVertical out/fixtures/director-vertical.mp4 --frames=0-29 && remotion render DirectorLandscape out/fixtures/director-landscape.mp4 --frames=0-29 && remotion still DirectorCoverVertical out/fixtures/director-cover-vertical.png && remotion still DirectorCoverLandscape out/fixtures/director-cover-landscape.png
